algorithms.algo_name: Building Height Enrichment From Raster Reserved
FusionCode Cascaded Geometry Priority Building Fusion
Trajectory To Road Candidate Reserved Seam

data_needs.description: Building fusion consumes prepared building bundles in the shared runtime path.
Building fusion produces fused building output.
POI fusion consumes prepared POI bundles.
POI fusion produces fused POI output.
Road fusion consumes prepared road bundles.
Road fusion produces fused road output.
Reserved trajectory seam consumes raw trajectories.
Reserved trajectory seam produces road candidates.
Water fusion consumes prepared water bundles.
Water fusion produces fused water polygons.
Waterways fusion consumes prepared waterways bundles.
Waterways fusion produces fused waterways output.

metadata.track_b_implementation_goal: Expand the current building path from OSM plus one reference into a locked multi-source national workflow.
Upgrade the current OSM-only road baseline to a dual-source national fusion path with Overture Transportation as the locked second-source target.
Expand the current building path from OSM plus one reference into a locked multi-source national workflow.
Upgrade the current OSM-only road baseline to a dual-source national fusion path with Overture Transportation as the locked second-source target.
Keep polygon water fusion explicit, with OSM water polygons plus HydroLAKES as the active national polygon route.
Keep polygon water fusion explicit, with OSM water polygons plus HydroLAKES as the active national polygon route.
Keep line waterways separate from polygon water, with OSM waterways as the base and Pakistan local waterways as the first manual supplement contract.

data_sources.source_name: Flood Waterways Bundle (OSM + Pakistan Local Waterways)

metadata.track_b_implementation_goal: Keep OSM plus GNS as the first national POI pair, with RH as a manual local supplement and Overture Places deferred until field alignment work is complete.
Upgrade the current OSM-only road baseline to a dual-source national fusion path with Overture Transportation as the locked second-source target.

metadata.license_boundary: Official GNS gazetteer export; keep name and identifier provenance visible in normalized POI outputs and evidence bundles.
metadata.track_b_notes: Promoted B5 POI reference source with bounded country-zip discovery and AOI clip support.

metadata.license_boundary: Manual reference preload only; keep provider attribution and do not promote as automated remote support.
metadata.track_b_notes: Included in the first-phase building matrix but still depends on local preload discipline.

metadata.license_boundary: Manual reference preload only; keep provider attribution and do not market it as remote automation support.
metadata.track_b_notes: Acts as a reserved national clip input until later building source-set work promotes it.

metadata.license_boundary: Provider-published hydro polygon source; preserve upstream attribution and keep runtime claims tied to checked polygon-style evidence.
metadata.track_b_notes: Promoted B2 polygon-style water reference with bounded remote download plus clip support.

metadata.license_boundary: Provider-published hydro line source; preserve upstream attribution and keep runtime claims tied to checked line-style evidence.
metadata.track_b_notes: HydroRIVERS remains a remote waterways line reference, separate from local Pakistan waterways supplements.

metadata.license_boundary: Local cache of a provider source; keep attribution and treat it as an operational cache rather than a new public source.
metadata.track_b_notes: Preferred fallback when repeated Microsoft country-tile downloads are too expensive for national runs.

metadata.license_boundary: Manual local waterways preload only; keep it clearly separated from HydroRIVERS claims and preserve local source attribution in evidence.
metadata.track_b_notes: Pakistan-local waterways supplement contract for preloaded OSM-like line data.

metadata.license_boundary: Manual local hydro cache; keep it clearly marked as preload-only evidence rather than remote automation.
metadata.track_b_notes: Retained as an operator cache fallback after the HydroRIVERS plus HydroLAKES remote pair was promoted.

metadata.license_boundary: Provider-published building footprints; preserve provider attribution and keep runtime claims bounded to checked evidence.
metadata.track_b_notes: Official remote building reference already used by the shared runtime.

metadata.license_boundary: Manual reference preload only; preserve source attribution and keep capability claims bounded until runtime evidence exists.
metadata.track_b_notes: Locked into the national matrix as a preload-only reference, not as a promoted runtime source.

metadata.license_boundary: ODbL-derived community vector source; preserve attribution in evidence and outputs.
metadata.track_b_notes: Primary automated building source for both direct AOI and large-area tiling runs.

metadata.license_boundary: ODbL-derived community POI source; preserve attribution in fused outputs and evidence packages.
ODbL-derived community road source; preserve attribution in evidence and operator outputs.
ODbL-derived community water source; preserve attribution and separate line/polygon semantics in downstream claims.
ODbL-derived community waterways line source; preserve attribution and keep line semantics explicit in downstream claims.
metadata.track_b_notes: OSM waterways line layer materialized from the Geofabrik bundle for national waterways fusion.

metadata.license_boundary: Optional local preload alias for the promoted Overture transportation source; keep attribution and treat it as an operator cache rather than a separate public source claim.
metadata.track_b_notes: Kept as a manual cache alias for operators who want to avoid repeated Overture downloads during national validation runs.

metadata.license_boundary: Bounded Overture transportation materialization path for the promoted B2 road second source; keep attribution and runtime claims tied to checked evidence.
metadata.track_b_notes: Promoted B2 road second-source id that resolves from local preload first and can fall back to the Overture download path.

metadata.license_boundary: Manual local sample source; keep it out of promoted national claims unless explicit evidence is added.
metadata.track_b_notes: Optional local supplement that can support field-alignment work.

metadata.notes: Expose stable fused building columns without changing adapter behavior.
POI output schema documents current shared bundle runtime columns for uploaded and task-driven auto runs without enforcing adapter output.
Road output schema documents the canonical V7 conflation fields exposed by the active runtime path.
Water output schema documents current shared bundle runtime columns for uploaded and task-driven auto runs without enforcing adapter output.
Waterways output schema documents the canonical V7 line conflation fields and keeps line semantics explicit.

parameter_specs.description: Conservative match threshold for safe mode.
parameter_specs.label: Match Similarity Threshold

parameter_specs.description: Conservative area similarity threshold for safe mode.
parameter_specs.label: One-to-One Min Area Similarity

parameter_specs.description: Conservative shape similarity threshold for safe mode.
parameter_specs.label: One-to-One Min Shape Similarity

parameter_specs.description: Conservative one-to-one overlap threshold for safe mode.
parameter_specs.label: One-to-One Min Overlap Similarity

provenance.reason: Google/OSM building matches need stricter geometry confidence.

parameter_specs.description: Pairs with similarity > this value are treated as matched (legacy label=1).
parameter_specs.label: Match Similarity Threshold

parameter_specs.description: For 1:1 matches, sim_area must be >= this value to fuse as one-to-one.
parameter_specs.label: One-to-One Min Area Similarity

parameter_specs.description: For 1:1 matches, sim_shape must be >= this value to fuse as one-to-one.
parameter_specs.label: One-to-One Min Shape Similarity

parameter_specs.description: For 1:1 matches, sim_overlap must be >= this value to fuse as one-to-one.
parameter_specs.label: One-to-One Min Overlap Similarity

parameter_specs.description: Conservative split angle threshold for safe mode.
parameter_specs.label: Split Angle Threshold

parameter_specs.description: Conservative endpoint snap tolerance for safe mode.
parameter_specs.label: Snap Tolerance

parameter_specs.description: Conservative match buffer for safe mode.
parameter_specs.label: Match Buffer Distance

parameter_specs.description: Conservative Hausdorff threshold for safe mode.
parameter_specs.label: Max Hausdorff Distance

parameter_specs.description: Conservative dedupe buffer for safe mode.
parameter_specs.label: Dedupe Buffer Distance

parameter_specs.description: Split lines at sharp turns: angles below this threshold trigger a split.
parameter_specs.label: Split Angle Threshold

parameter_specs.description: Endpoint snap tolerance used when normalizing line endpoints.
parameter_specs.label: Snap Tolerance

parameter_specs.description: Buffer radius for candidate matching between OSM and reference lines.
parameter_specs.label: Match Buffer Distance

parameter_specs.description: Maximum Hausdorff distance allowed to consider two lines as a match.
parameter_specs.label: Max Hausdorff Distance

parameter_specs.description: Buffer distance used during post-fusion deduplication.
parameter_specs.label: Dedupe Buffer Distance
